vector-skin-desc:
Waxay bixisaa 2 muuqaal oo Vector ah:
* 2011 - Nooca casriga ah ee MonoBook oo leh muuqaal cusub iyo hagaajinno badan oo isticmaal fududayn ah.
* 2022 - Vector-ka lagu sameeyay mashruuca WMF ee [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Desktop_Improvements Hagaajinta shaashada].
prefs-vector-enable-vector-1-help: Sannadaha soo socda gudahooda, waxaan si tartiib ah u cusboonaysiin doonnaa muuqaalka Vector. Vector hore  wuxuu kuu oggolaanayaa inaad aragto noocii hore ee Vector (sida uu ahaa Disembar 2019). Si aad wax badan uga barato cusboonaysiinta, u tag [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Reading/Web/Desktop_Improvements bogga mashruuca].
vector-language-button-aria-label: U gudub maqaal ku qoran luqad kale. Waxaa lagu heli karaa {{PLURAL:$1|$1 luqad|$1 luqadood}}
vector-appearance-tooltip: Beddel muuqaalka cabbirka farta, ballaca, iyo midabka bogga
skin-theme-description: [Nooc tijaabo ah, suurtagalnimada khaladaad waa sare] Wuxuu yareeyaa iftiinka ka soo baxa shaashadaha qalabka.
skin-theme-exclusion-notice: Boggan mar walba wuxuu ku jiraa qaab iftiin ah.
vector-feature-custom-font-size-exclusio: Boggan had iyo jeer wuxuu isticmaalaa cabbir font yar
vector-feature-limited-width-exclusion-n: Nuxurku waa sida ugu ballaaran ee suurtagalka ah ee daaqadda biraawsarkaaga.
vector-prefs-limited-width-help: Daar habka ballaca xaddidan si loo hagaajiyo khibradda akhriska.
empty-language-selector-body: Nuxurka bogan laguma taageero luqado kale.
vector-page-tools-unpinned-popup: Liiska qalabka ayaa loo wareejiyay halkan.
vector-main-menu-unpinned-popup: Liiska ugu weyn ayaa loo wareejiyay halkan.
vector-appearance-unpinned-popup: Liiska muuqaalka ayaa loo wareejiyay halkan.
vector-night-mode-gadget-warning: Waxaad isticmaalaysaa qalab hab mugdi ah oo carqaladeynaya astaantan. [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-gadgets|Demi qalabka]] si aad u isticmaasho habka mugdiga.
vector-night-mode-issue-reporting-notice: Ka warbixi marka midabada habka mugdigu ay adkeeyaan akhriska.
vector-night-mode-issue-reporting-link-l: Ka warbixi dhibaato la xiriirta habka mugdiga
vector-night-mode-issue-reporting-preloa:
<!--
Tilmaamo
Fadlan sharax sida midabada habka mugdigu uga dhigayaan Wikipedia mid adag in la akhriyo.
Fadlan ku dar qaybta maqaalka aad ka heshay dhibaatada.
-->
'''Sharaxaadda Dhibaatada'''
